entity_types.name: ExperimentRun
entity_types.description: A single fermentation/expression experiment described in a paper.

fields.name: experiment_id
fields.description: Paper-local id, e.g. 'wj-exp-01'. Stable for cross-references.

fields.name: paper_section
fields.description: Paper section/chapter where this experiment is described.

fields.name: goal
fields.description: What the experiment studies: what's held fixed, what varies, what's measured.

fields.name: fixed_parameters
fields.description: Parameters held constant, e.g. ['温度=25°C', '菌株=10-Pp-Pr']

fields.name: strain_construct
fields.description: Snapshot of strain + vector + product configuration used in this experiment.

fields.name: promoters
fields.description: One or more promoters, e.g. ['AOX1'] or ['AOX1', 'DAS2']

fields.name: phases
fields.description: Process parameters per fermentation phase, in temporal order.

fields.name: phase_name
fields.description: Controlled vocabulary: glycerol_batch | glycerol_fed_batch | starvation | methanol_induction | shake_flask | seed_culture | harvest | other

fields.name: outcome
fields.description: Reported quantitative outcomes of the experiment.

fields.name: max_yield
fields.description: Reported peak product titer, e.g. '10.3 g/L'

fields.name: linked_figure_ids
fields.description: FigureData.figure_id values whose curves quantify this experiment.

entity_types.name: ExperimentLineageEdge
entity_types.description: Directed edge: how one experiment derives from / builds on another within a paper.

fields.name: from_id
fields.description: Parent experiment_id (the one being built upon).

fields.name: relation
fields.description: Short label: derives_from | scales_up | applies_optimum | varies_parameter | replaces_component | branches | parallel

fields.name: summary
fields.description: One-sentence description of how the child differs from the parent.
